name: browser-navigator-marketplace
description: Claude Code marketplace for browser-navigator, a local browser MCP built for text-first models.

plugins.name: browser-navigator
plugins.description: Drive a real local browser from Claude Code: compact page views, structured extraction, forms, uploads, dialogs and downloads, tabs, session management, reusable profiles/storage state, managed CDP launch/connect, in-page JavaScript, fetch/XHR and console capture, screenshots, and page-level security snapshots.
